examples: When they returned to Rockaway the next day, they found their neighbourhood in ruins.
They cornered me in the alley just south of Rockaway.
Natalie also worked with other organizations to bring much-need supplies to Rockaway.
An 1893 hurricane submerged a populated island, Atlantis-style, that lay south of the present Rockaway shore.
Norma Mancia, a Salvadoran immigrant, lost precious documents when her Far Rockaway home flooded.
